name: ruby-llm-v1
description: Claude Code skill for RubyLLM gem 1.x (currently pinned to 1.14.1) — unified Ruby API for OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Bedrock, Azure, OpenRouter and more. Covers chat, streaming, tools, structured output (RubyLLM::Schema), Rails integration (acts_as_chat, Turbo broadcasting, generators), agents, embeddings, image generation, moderation, transcription and error hierarchy. Every claim verified against crmne/ruby_llm@1.14.1 source.
